Bruno Fernandes ‘not going anywhere’ as Amorim lays down Premier League challenge
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes will not be leaving Manchester United in the summer transfer window, manager Ruben Amorim insists. The Red Devils are set to offload a host of first-team players ahead of next season to ease their financial burden and keep in line with the Premier League‘s Profit and Sustainability Rules. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford warned Aston Villa are 'too wise' to sign him from Man Utd permanently
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has made six goal contributions in 10 appearances since joining Aston Villa on loan in January, but former Crystal Palace owner Simon Jordan believes they will not sign him permanently

arts.ttl: Manchester United player having loan nightmare – Seen as bad signing already
arts.sum: Manchester United allowed Tyrell Malacia to go out on loan to PSV Eindhoven in the winter market, after signing Patrick Dorgu from US Lecce in the same window. The Dutchman spent 500 days on the sidelines and returned to action in November. arts.ttl: Leny Yoro says 17-year-old Manchester United teammate can be “one of world’s best”
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin has played four times for Manchester United’s first-team this season. He’s already shown glimpses of his ability to get into the right positions in the final third, impressing in his cameo against Fulham in the FA Cup.
